TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pratan, title = Pratan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pratan} }

S.FORM: alang Pratan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 256 buwan, 797 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 747 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 50 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 83%, Amis 3%, Tayan 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pratan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Pratan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Pratan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Pratan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pratan hya' ga Dowras. tay mkyahu' na Pratan hya' ga Qowgan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Pratan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 256 buwan, 797 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 747 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 50 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 83%, Amis 3%, Tayan 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pratan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Pratan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Pratan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Pratan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pratan hya' ga Dowras. tay mkyahu' na Pratan hya' ga Qowgan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pratan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pratan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na pratan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pratan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na pratan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pratan ħjaʔ ɣa *owras~ɕ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pratan ħjaʔ ɣa qowɣan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
